---
title: "Reproducible Analysis for ICBB 2026 Paper 106"
author: "Xia Wu"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
dir.create("results", showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create("results/figures", recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
```

## Packages

```{r packages}
required_packages <- c(
  "readr", "dplyr", "limma", "FactoMineR", "ggplot2", "ggpubr",
  "glmnet", "stringr", "ROCR", "patchwork", "tibble"
)

missing_packages <- required_packages[!vapply(required_packages, requireNamespace, logical(1), quietly = TRUE)]
if (length(missing_packages) > 0) {
  stop("Install missing packages before running: ", paste(missing_packages, collapse = ", "))
}

library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(limma)
library(FactoMineR)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggpubr)
library(glmnet)
library(stringr)
library(ROCR)
library(patchwork)
library(tibble)
```

## Data Input

```{r data-input}
expression_file <- file.path("data", "raw", "HiSeqV2")
clinical_file <- file.path("data", "raw", "TCGA.COAD.sampleMap_COAD_clinicalMatrix")

if (!file.exists(expression_file)) {
  stop("Missing expression file: ", expression_file)
}
if (!file.exists(clinical_file)) {
  stop("Missing clinical file: ", clinical_file)
}

raw_data <- read_tsv(expression_file, show_col_types = FALSE)
clinical_data <- read_tsv(clinical_file, show_col_types = FALSE)

gene_ids <- raw_data$sample
expression_matrix <- as.data.frame(as.matrix(raw_data[, -1]))
rownames(expression_matrix) <- gene_ids
```

## Preprocessing

The original workflow classified samples by TCGA barcode prefixes available in the expression matrix. Tumor and normal groups are retained in the same order used for the conference-paper analysis.

```{r preprocessing}
tumor_columns <- grep("TCGA-A", colnames(expression_matrix), value = TRUE)
tumor_expression <- expression_matrix[, tumor_columns]
normal_expression <- expression_matrix[, setdiff(colnames(expression_matrix), tumor_columns)]

stopifnot(ncol(tumor_expression) == 143)
stopifnot(ncol(normal_expression) == 186)

analysis_matrix <- cbind(tumor_expression, normal_expression)
group <- factor(c(rep("tumor", ncol(tumor_expression)), rep("normal", ncol(normal_expression))),
                levels = c("normal", "tumor"))

dim(analysis_matrix)
table(group)
```

## Differential Expression Analysis

```{r differential-expression}
design <- model.matrix(~ 0 + group)
colnames(design) <- levels(group)
contrast_matrix <- makeContrasts(tumor - normal, levels = design)

fit <- lmFit(analysis_matrix, design)
fit2 <- contrasts.fit(fit, contrast_matrix)
fit2 <- eBayes(fit2)

all_diff <- topTable(fit2, coef = 1, number = Inf)
all_diff$gene <- rownames(all_diff)
all_diff <- all_diff %>%
  mutate(change = case_when(
    P.Value < 0.05 & logFC > 2 ~ "Up",
    P.Value < 0.05 & logFC < -2 ~ "Down",
    TRUE ~ "Stable"
  ))

write.table(all_diff, file = "results/limma_all_genes.tsv", sep = "\t", quote = FALSE, row.names = FALSE)

deg <- all_diff %>% filter(change != "Stable")
write.table(deg, file = "results/differentially_expressed_genes.tsv", sep = "\t", quote = FALSE, row.names = FALSE)

table(deg$change)
```

```{r volcano, fig.width=7, fig.height=5}
volcano_plot <- ggplot(all_diff, aes(x = logFC, y = -log10(adj.P.Val), colour = change)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.45, size = 2.2) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(Down = "#546de5", Stable = "#d2dae2", Up = "#ff4757")) +
  labs(x = "log2 fold change", y = "-log10 adjusted p-value") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank())

ggsave("results/figures/volcano_plot.png", volcano_plot, width = 7, height = 5, dpi = 300)
volcano_plot
```

## PCA

```{r pca}
pca_all <- PCA(as.data.frame(t(analysis_matrix)), scale.unit = TRUE, ncp = 2, graph = FALSE)
deg_expression <- analysis_matrix[rownames(analysis_matrix) %in% deg$gene, ]
pca_deg <- PCA(as.data.frame(t(deg_expression)), scale.unit = TRUE, ncp = 2, graph = FALSE)

pca_all$eig[1:2, ]
pca_deg$eig[1:2, ]
```

```{r pca-plot, fig.width=8, fig.height=4}
pca_scores <- as.data.frame(pca_deg$ind$coord[, 1:2])
pca_scores$group <- group

pca_plot <- ggplot(pca_scores, aes(x = Dim.1, y = Dim.2, color = group)) +
  geom_point(size = 2, alpha = 0.75) +
  stat_ellipse(type = "norm", linewidth = 0.6) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(x = "PC1", y = "PC2", color = "")

ggsave("results/figures/pca_deg.png", pca_plot, width = 8, height = 4, dpi = 300)
pca_plot
```

## LASSO Logistic Regression

```{r lasso}
set.seed(106)
x <- t(deg_expression)
y <- ifelse(group == "tumor", 1, 0)

cv_fit <- cv.glmnet(x = x, y = y, family = "binomial", nlambda = 1000, alpha = 1)

model_lasso_min <- glmnet(x = x, y = y, family = "binomial", alpha = 1, lambda = cv_fit$lambda.min)
model_lasso_1se <- glmnet(x = x, y = y, family = "binomial", alpha = 1, lambda = cv_fit$lambda.1se)

coef_min <- coef(model_lasso_min)
coef_1se <- coef(model_lasso_1se)

selected_min <- rownames(coef_min)[as.numeric(coef_min) != 0]
selected_1se <- rownames(coef_1se)[as.numeric(coef_1se) != 0]
selected_min <- setdiff(selected_min, "(Intercept)")
selected_1se <- setdiff(selected_1se, "(Intercept)")

selected_genes <- tibble(
  model = c("lambda_minimum", "lambda_1se"),
  selected_genes = c(paste(selected_min, collapse = ", "), paste(selected_1se, collapse = ", ")),
  n_genes = c(length(selected_min), length(selected_1se))
)

write.table(selected_genes, file = "results/lasso_selected_genes.tsv", sep = "\t", quote = FALSE, row.names = FALSE)
selected_genes
```

```{r lasso-roc, fig.width=6, fig.height=5}
probabilities <- predict(cv_fit, newx = x, s = c(cv_fit$lambda.min, cv_fit$lambda.1se), type = "response")
prediction_table <- data.frame(
  event = y,
  prob_min = probabilities[, 1],
  prob_1se = probabilities[, 2]
)

pred_min <- prediction(prediction_table$prob_min, prediction_table$event)
pred_1se <- prediction(prediction_table$prob_1se, prediction_table$event)
auc_min <- performance(pred_min, "auc")@y.values[[1]]
auc_1se <- performance(pred_1se, "auc")@y.values[[1]]
perf_min <- performance(pred_min, "tpr", "fpr")
perf_1se <- performance(pred_1se, "tpr", "fpr")

png("results/figures/roc_curves.png", width = 1800, height = 1500, res = 300)
plot(perf_min, colorize = FALSE, col = "blue", main = "ROC Curves for LASSO Models")
plot(perf_1se, colorize = FALSE, col = "red", add = TRUE)
lines(c(0, 1), c(0, 1), col = "gray", lty = 4)
legend("bottomright",
       legend = c(paste0("lambda-minimum AUC = ", round(auc_min, 3)),
                  paste0("lambda-1se AUC = ", round(auc_1se, 3))),
       col = c("blue", "red"), lwd = 2, bty = "n")
dev.off()

c(auc_min = auc_min, auc_1se = auc_1se)
```
